changes.comment: New package. Scaffolded as phase B-1 of the local-ai-exploration cluster. Empty but compilable: heft + webpack dual setup, IScenario contract types, secretResolver B-1 stub, empty scenario registry, chocolate-lab-pattern data pipeline, web shell composing @fgv/ts-app-shell primitives, CLI shell printing the empty-registry banner. Long-lived showcase app that grows scenarios over time.
